name: hive-vm
description: Agent-native compute marketplace. CLI + control plane for scheduling, metering, and billing agent workloads.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun build src/cli.ts --target bun --outfile dist/cli.js && bun build src/index.ts --target bun --outfile dist/index.js
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test:run

author: Ben Tossell
